source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

overview.summary: The Elder Races predate the appearance of humans and still possess great power in Glorantha.

races.name: Aldryami
races.detail: Plant-like beings tied to forests, descended from Aldrya. Types include green, brown, yellow, black, red, dryads, and runners.

races.name: Dragonewts
races.detail: Ancient descendants of Dragons who reincarnate and metamorphose through several stages in pursuit of dragonhood.

races.name: Mostali
races.detail: Underground makers descended from Mostal, associated with practical sorcery, machinery, and extraordinary craftsmanship.

races.name: Merfolk
races.detail: Water-living but air-breathing descendants of the gods, with finned lower bodies and arms and hands.

races.name: Trolls
races.detail: Mostly subterranean matriarchal people associated with darkness, with several social types including dark trolls, great trolls, Mistress Race, trollkin, and cave trolls.

races.name: Broo
races.detail: Chaotic, foul, brutal creatures of indistinct parentage and rampant corruption.

other_peoples.summary: Other lesser or more local peoples include centaurs, ducks, intelligent baboons, giants, morokanth, newtlings, scorpion men, and Wind Children.
